name: Voter Protection Project
subject: We can't believe the president said this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | We've never seen anything like this before: Our own president wants to compromise the integrity of our elections- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - We've never seen anything like this before: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0742/72412298/429864d7/610187e6/2513037653/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1") _**Our own president wants to compromise the integrity of our elections**_ \-- and he sent an open invitation to foreign governments to interfere. We all know why Trump wants Russia and other foreign actors to compromise our next election: **there 's irrefutable evidence that Russia hacked our elections in 2016 to help him win**, and he knows that he'll be able to secure another 4 years if this happens again. [**It 's absolutely necessary that we condemn this now. Sign our petition immediately to denounce Trump for this blatant rebuke of our democracy >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0742/72412298/429864d7/610187e9/2513037653/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+absolutely+necessary+that+we+co&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1") | | | [Sign on >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0742/72412298/429864d7/610187e8/2513037653/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+on+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190614_TrumpForeignGov_U1_X1")
---
**Peter -- the President 's behavior is blatantly illegal and a violation of U.S. election law. If Trump wins a second term because of help from a foreign government, he'll be indebted to them for the rest of his time in office.**
Even the Chair of the Federal Elections Committee, Ellen Weintrub, _**released a statement condemning the President 's solicitation**_ \-- and said that "anyone who solicits or accepts foreign assistance risks being on the wrong end of a federal investigation".
**Our executive office can 't become a puppet for foreign actors. It's against everything our country stands for.**
Sign now to stand with us in condemning Trump: https://go.protectvoting.org/DenounceTrumpandForeignInterference
\-- Voter Protection Project

name: Brandon Beach
subject: Washington is a Mess...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beach for Congress |
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter, Washington is a mess. Rather than focusing on bold solutions to our nation’s most pressing problems, the Democrats are pushing a radical, socialistic agenda and grinding all progress to a halt. Unfortunately, we would not be in this situation if the Republicans in the last Congress kept their word. Instead, we got stuck with Obamacare, border security was inadequately funded, and Republicans lost the House. **I’m running for Congress because we deserve better.** **[Will you join my campaign to take back the sixth district by donating $500, $250, $100 or even $50 before our end of quarter fundraising deadline on June 30th?](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidlutlk-udyuidthb-y/)** My friend, I’m ready to hit the ground running in Washington and employ bold solutions to get our government functioning again. **That’s exactly what I’ve done in the State Senate by passing the largest tax cut in Georgia history, increasing investments in infrastructure and education, and by cracking down on gangs and criminal illegal immigrants.** **As a man of my word, I did what I said I would do and delivered real results, not excuses. It’s that kind of bold leadership that has been sorely lacking in Congress for years.** But to take back our district, I need your help. Even though I have proven time and again that I can win tough campaigns, defeating Lucy McBath won’t be easy. And I need you by my side. **[Please consider making an immediate online donation to our campaign today.](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidlutlk-udyuidthb-j/)** Every dollar that you can donate before the June 30th FEC deadline will go a long way in helping us spread our message and our bold solutions to get Washington working. I look forward to sharing more about those solutions in the coming weeks and months, but before I do, I need your help today. **[That’s why I hope you’ll join our team by making a donation immediately today. Any amount you can give will be a tremendous help.](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidlutlk-udyuidthb-t/)** Thanks for all you can do. Brandon [DONATE TODAY](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidlutlk-udyuidthb-i/) |

subject: OPEN AND SIGN: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | **NEWSWEEK:** **SENATE MAJORITY LEADER MITCH MCCONNELL HAS A PLAN TO OVERTURN ROE V. WADE**

_" Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell outlined his efforts to stack the courts against Roe v. Wade in an interview with an anti-abortion rights video channel this week. The Kentucky Republican also indicated that the Senate would likely hold more votes this session on the fate of abortion in the U.S. including on 'some kind of legislation related to Planned Parenthood.'"_

[_**TAKE ACTION: Add your name to demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd3b/693b8b0a/58ecfe6d/72de8b14/197637941/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-reproductivefreedom-ja%3Frefcode%3D061519%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
Hello -- Almost five decades ago, Roe v. Wade protected a woman's right to make her own health care decisions.

But now, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and GOP lawmakers are doing everything they can to erode reproductive freedoms across the country.

We can't let ultraconservatives overturn Roe v. Wade or allow them to undermine women's access to comprehensive health care - we need to fight back now before it's too late to act.

_**[Sign the petition: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd3b/693b8b0a/58ecfe6d/72de8b14/197637941/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-reproductivefreedom-ja%3Frefcode%3D061519%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_

From states like Georgia, Mississippi, Ohio and Iowa effectively banning abortions before women know they are pregnant, to threats of defunding Planned Parenthood at every level of government, to President Trump restricting birth control access - far-right attacks on women have grown bolder and more extreme.

And unless Americans stand together and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, they're attacks on women's rights will only get worse.

Speak up now and stand up to Mitch McConnell and GOP lawmakers and say NO MORE!

[_**Sign the petition: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd3b/693b8b0a/58ecfe6d/72de8b14/197637941/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-reproductivefreedom-ja%3Frefcode%3D061519%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Friend,

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I want a clean Earth for our kids. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Listen, Clean energy isn't just good for our planet. It's good for jobs.

We need a new social pact. One that makes our carbon footprint smaller. One that creates new jobs. Good paying jobs in small towns. In every corner of the U.S.

_**[As President I will take this on head first. And I'm looking to you to help me have my voice heard. Will you contribute to my travel fund? The budget deadline is tomorrow at midnight.](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190615_1_1_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+As+President+I+will+take+this+on+head+fi&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190615_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190615_1_1_T2")**_

There are 800 parts in a windmill. By 2030, there will be 30 million electric cars on the road. And the solar industry will grow at 50% each year.

Someone has to build these things -- and I want it to be the United States. Not China.

name: Evelyn Yang
subject: The Andrew That I Know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=61519_fathers_day_2&n=1) When I first met Andrew, the thing that stuck out most to me was that he was earnest and genuine. He’s been honest with me from that first moment, and still, to this day, he wears his heart on his sleeve. When we were first together, that meant that I always knew exactly how much he cared about me. Now that we have two children together, it means that I can see how much he cares about them. No matter how busy he is on the road, Andrew makes sure to call us as much as possible. Even when he takes the red-eye back to New York, he wakes up to take our oldest son to school. The kids don’t know exactly what it means that daddy is running for president, but they do know, even when he can’t be home, that he loves them, and they’re the most important thing in his world. I’m unbelievably proud of what my husband is doing. He’s a man on a mission, and I fell in love with how animated and passionate he gets when he’s trying to solve a problem. But I’m even more proud of the father he is, and our two young boys are lucky to have such a wonderful dad. I get to see Andrew between the campaign stops, and I know exactly how much your support means to him. It boosts him up and keeps him moving forward, as much as his love for our children keeps him focused on the campaign trail. I know it would mean so much to him to read all the names of supporters tomorrow, wishing him Happy Father’s Day. [](yang2020.com/fathers-day "Father's Day Card for Andrew
Yang") [****Click here to add your name to Andrew’s Father’s Day card****](yang2020.com/fathers-day "Father's Day Card for Andrew
Yang") -Evelyn
---
---
Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality.

I know it would mean so much to him to read all the names of supporters tomorrow, wishing him Happy Father’s Day. yang2020.com/fathers-day "Father's Day Card for Andrew Yang" yang2020.com/fathers-day "Father's Day Card for Andrew Yang" -Evelyn Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang. All rights reserved. New York, NY #humanityfirst

Here's how I see it: Our country is locked in a battle for the soul of this nation.

In recent years, we took giant steps forward on civil liberties and civil rights. We should be building on that progress. But instead, we are being met by a ferocious pushback from the oldest and darkest forces in America.

It's not too late. We can stem the tide of hate and abuse we're seeing from this White House and start moving forward again.

There is no reason we can't own the 21st century. _We just have to get out of our own way and remember who we are._

Peter, together, we will restore this version of America. I promise you that. But first we need to get through this election.

The strength of this movement depends on you. **Can you stand with me and chip in $5 before Tuesday 's deadline?**

Joe

subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"Kim Kardashian West, who was a driving force behind the commutation of Alice Johnson, returned to the White House to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=866b231086&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Kim Kardashian West Returns to White House for Prisoner Reentry Event](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5b289fdd8&e=3ee4985eea)
-CBS News
“Kim Kardashian West, who was a driving force behind the commutation of Alice Johnson, returned to the White House to speak at an event promoting the hiring of prisoners released early under the First Step Act, the criminal justice reform law President Trump signed into law in December,” CBS reports. “These people want to work. They want the best outcome,” Kardashian West said.
---
|
---
| [**F-35 Over Washington:****An****Excellent Message to Friend and Foe**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce4cc9060c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“President Trump was right on Wednesday to order an F-35B strike fighter overflight of Washington, D.C. The display was a gesture to visiting Polish President Andrzej Duda. Poland intends to buy a number of F-35s,” Tom Rogan writes. “But this flypast also sends a broader message to the world . . . It's better to be an American friend than an American enemy.”

**🎬****Watch:** [**A historic F-35 White House flyover**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb0db75289&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [When Will Congress Get Serious About the Suffering at the Border?](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ed75fc629&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The New York Times_
“It is time for Congress to stop dithering and pass emergency funding to deal with this nightmare” at our southern border, _The New York Times_ editorial board writes. “Border facilities and migrant shelters are dangerously overcrowded, and the staff is overburdened. Dysfunction, disease and even death are a growing reality.” The bottom line: “It has been more than a month since the administration sent Congress a request for $4.5 billion in additional border assistance.” The time for action is now.
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump Pushes Initiative to Give Women Bigger Role in Global Peace Efforts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c48f68051b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
Research shows that countries are more peaceful and stable when women have a seat at the decision-making table. The Trump Administration unveiled a new initiative this week “aimed at giving women a bigger role in global peace and security efforts,” Catherine Lucey reports. “White House senior adviser Ivanka Trump, the president’s daughter, has been a key champion of the effort and took part in a discussion about it at the Capitol with a bipartisan group of lawmakers.”

**🎬****Watch:**[Ivanka Trump on getting more Americans into the workforce](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4fadeccba0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| ["It's a Huge Deal" – Iowa Farmers React to President Trump's Order on E15 Fuel](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=368c084986&e=3ee4985eea)
-KETV
“President Donald Trump came to Council Bluffs to praise farmers, and pledged to continue fighting for them,” José Zozaya reports. “The president announced year-round sales of E15 fuel,” as well as new actions to help farmers produce safer, more sustainable crops without excessive interference from Washington. “It’s a huge deal,” said local farmer Bruce Bracker. President Trump is “a businessman that keeps his word.”
---
|
---
| [A Win for Trump in the Border Fight](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f84fe6059e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Boston Herald_
“Chalk up another big win for President Trump, getting Mexico to act on the border crisis that do-nothing Democrats continue to recklessly ignore and downplay at America’s peril,” Adriana Cohen writes. “In May alone, 144,278 illegal immigrants were apprehended at the border . . . [Last week,] the president announced the U.S. has reached an agreement with Mexico to stem the tide of illegal immigrants.”

**🎬****Watch** : [Thank you to the brave men and women who protect our border!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76c74750c6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Gov. Wolf and President Trump Find Common Ground on Workforce Issues](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d70113aeb&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_
Gov. Tom Wolf (D-PA) and President Trump “don’t agree on much, but common ground brought them together Thursday – along with seven other governors – to discuss barriers to workforce entry,” Tracie Mauriello writes. “Two initiatives both support are criminal justice reforms that make it easier for people convicted of crimes to re-enter the workforce and occupational licensing reforms that loosen requirements and make it easier for military spouses to transfer licenses between states.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a862b7f8e1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fbeb91076&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1a3f8d7ee7)
---

name: Rick Palacio, Team Hickenlooper
subject: What John did at my wedding:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
A little about me: a sixth-generation Coloradan, I was the first Latino to ever chair the Colorado Democratic Party, and one year ago, I got married to my partner in crime and the love of my life--Gra | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4ca62/745489568/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--I'm Rick, John's friend and an advisor to this campaign. And this Pride Month, I wanted to shoot you a note to say [**_how much it would mean to me personally if you could support John on this journey toward the White House._**](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pride-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

A little about me: a sixth-generation Coloradan, I was the first Latino to ever chair the Colorado Democratic Party, and one year ago, **I got married to my partner in crime and the love of my life --Graham.**

These multiple aspects of my identity have given me a front-row seat to multiple battles for civil rights, especially as they've played out in a purple state.

**One of my most important allies along the way has been John.** Not only has John been a supporter of the LGBTQ community his whole life (no learning curve there), he acted on that support while he was Governor. In 2013, he called a special session of our state legislature to legalize civil unions--and once marriage equality became federal law, Graham and I knew exactly whom we wanted to pronounce _us_ husband and husband. [](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pride-all_all_i1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_Here 's John marrying us, using vows we wrote ourselves._ John has been my Mayor, my Governor, my Democratic ally, my friend, my marriage officiant, my drinking buddy--and now, I want to see him as my President. **We need a commander-in-chief who embraces all Americans and who will never compromise on achieving dignity, equality, and inclusion for all.**

With all the progress we've made, we can't afford to see it rolled back--least of all by the two Trump appointees now installed on the Supreme Court.

[**_In honor of Pride Month, can you stand with John today to help grow this campaign into a force that can defeat Donald Trump and protect the important progress we 've made?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pride-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pride-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you,
Rick

Rick Palacio
Senior Advisor
Hickenlooper 2020
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4cb9f/745489568/VEsA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4cb9c/745489568/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4cb9d/745489568/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4cb9a/745489568/VEsP/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4cb9b/745489568/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717d8/691c9bd/6de544e4/11a4cb98/745489568/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

With all the progress we've made, we can't afford to see it rolled back--least of all by the two Trump appointees now installed on the Supreme Court. name: Bernie 2020
subject: Can you take this quick debate issues survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5)
**Take two minutes to complete our official debate survey to say what you want covered during the debate.**
**Bernie needs to hear from you directly before he takes the stage later this month.
**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_june_debate_survey/?source=em190615-1-survey-60&refcode2=1712.150750.sD8GO5&t=2&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5)

Friends -
Not too long ago, the issues driving our campaign were considered fringe or extreme.
Medicare for All. A $15 minimum wage. Combating climate change. College for all. Immigration reform. All too radical.
Today those issues are supported by the majority of Americans – and later this month, they will be the focus of the first Democratic presidential debate. That is thanks in large part to our political revolution.
Over the course of the campaign, we've asked you to share what issues you care about. Now, as Bernie prepares for the debate, it's important that he knows what's top of mind for you.
**[Take two minutes to complete our debate survey to say what issues you'd like to see covered during the debate.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_june_debate_survey/?source=em190615-1-survey-60&refcode2=1712.150750.sD8GO5&t=3&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5)**
Here’s the first question:
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_june_debate_survey/?source=em190615-1-survey-60&refcode2=1712.150750.sD8GO5&t=4&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5)
This campaign is not just about winning this primary and defeating Trump. It's about transforming our country and ensuring every person has quality health care, a living wage, a complete education, affordable housing, retirement security, and a clean environment.
If we are going to be successful, we need to hear directly from people like you who are powering our movement across the country.
Can you take a moment to share which issues you care about most as we approach the first official Democratic debate?
**[Complete our brief debate survey to tell Bernie what you want him to discuss during the debate.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_june_debate_survey/?source=em190615-1-survey-60&refcode2=1712.150750.sD8GO5&t=5&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5)**
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_june_debate_survey/?source=em190615-1-survey-60&refcode2=1712.150750.sD8GO5&t=6&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1712_150750_sD8GO5&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=10&akid=1712%2E150750%2EsD8GO5).

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name: The racial wealth gap is holding back our economy and choking off entrepreneurship.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If everyone started off on the same footing, we'd have more small businesses opening their doors across the country, creating millions of new jobs and billions of dollars of economic growth. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e023/45c30650/16c3e7d0a/669b7894/2966124464/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com")
---
If you work hard and have a good idea, you should be able to start a small business and build something solid for you and your family.

But let's face it: Not every entrepreneur starts out with an equal chance at success.

Decades of government policy helped create a racial wealth gap. That means the playing field is tilted against entrepreneurs of color -- they don't have as much money to put into their businesses to get them going.

Just look at this stat: On average, Black entrepreneurs start a business with $35,000 in capital. That's a third of the startup capital for the typical white entrepreneur.

If everyone started off on the same footing, we'd have more small businesses opening their doors -- and keeping them open -- across the country, creating millions of new jobs and billions of dollars of economic growth.

**That 's why I have a new plan: a Small Business Equity Fund to help close the startup capital gap for entrepreneurs of color.

[But we can only get it done if we build a grassroots movement for it. Add your name to support our new plan.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e023/45c30650/16c3e7d0a/669b7897/2966124464/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYxNWVtMS1mdWxsLWIifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-entrepreneurship?source=20190615em1-full-b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Because this new plan is part of our economic patriotism agenda -- to use all the tools of government to defend and create good American jobs -- this new program will be run by the new Department of Economic Development.

**We 'll provide entrepreneurs with $7 billion of grants** -- no strings attached that would leave businesses with debt when they're trying to grow.

Why $7 billion? That's enough to ensure that if Black, Latinx, and Native American entrepreneurs start businesses at the same rate as white entrepreneurs, we could fully close the startup capital gap for the next ten years -- supporting over 100,000 new businesses and 1.1 million new jobs.

But we also need to tackle more of the systemic issues tilting the playing field against entrepreneurs of color.

Eighty-six percent of venture capitalists are white, and studies show that investors are more likely to partner with entrepreneurs who look like them. So I'll direct all federal pension and retirement funds to seek out a more diverse set of investment managers, require states and cities administering the new Fund to work with diverse investment managers, and triple the budget of the Minority Business Development Agency.

Wondering how we'll pay for all this? I've got a plan for that: It's fully covered by the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, which is just two cents on every dollar of wealth above $50 million.

**Our new plan embraces the fundamental truth that we can never achieve racial justice without economic justice.**

Government helped create the entrepreneurship gap, and government has an obligation to help solve it -- with bold policies that tackle the problem head on.

**Everyone deserves the opportunity to fight for the American dream -- to build something real and build a brighter future for themselves and their loved ones.

[Add your name if you agree. We've all got to be in this fight, side by side in a grassroots movement, to make government work for everyone -- not just the rich and powerful.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e023/45c30650/16c3e7d0a/669b7897/2966124464/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYxNWVtMS1mdWxsLWIifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-entrepreneurship?source=20190615em1-full-b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

clean_body: If everyone started off on the same footing, we'd have more small businesses opening their doors across the country, creating millions of new jobs and billions of dollars of economic growth. | | | "" If you work hard and have a good idea, you should be able to start a small business and build something solid for you and your family. But let's face it: Not every entrepreneur starts out with an equal chance at success. Decades of government policy helped create a racial wealth gap. That means the playing field is tilted against entrepreneurs of color -- they don't have as much money to put into their businesses to get them going. Just look at this stat: On average, Black entrepreneurs start a business with $35,000 in capital. That's a third of the startup capital for the typical white entrepreneur. If everyone started off on the same footing, we'd have more small businesses opening their doors -- and keeping them open -- across the country, creating millions of new jobs and billions of dollars of economic growth. That 's why I have a new plan: a Small Business Equity Fund to help close the startup capital gap for entrepreneurs of color. "" Because this new plan is part of our economic patriotism agenda -- to use all the tools of government to defend and create good American jobs -- this new program will be run by the new Department of Economic Development. We 'll provide entrepreneurs with $7 billion of grants -- no strings attached that would leave businesses with debt when they're trying to grow. Why $7 billion? That's enough to ensure that if Black, Latinx, and Native American entrepreneurs start businesses at the same rate as white entrepreneurs, we could fully close the startup capital gap for the next ten years -- supporting over 100,000 new businesses and 1.1 million new jobs. But we also need to tackle more of the systemic issues tilting the playing field against entrepreneurs of color. Eighty-six percent of venture capitalists are white, and studies show that investors are more likely to partner with entrepreneurs who look like them. So I'll direct all federal pension and retirement funds to seek out a more diverse set of investment managers, require states and cities administering the new Fund to work with diverse investment managers, and triple the budget of the Minority Business Development Agency. Wondering how we'll pay for all this? I've got a plan for that: It's fully covered by the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, which is just two cents on every dollar of wealth above $50 million. Our new plan embraces the fundamental truth that we can never achieve racial justice without economic justice. Government helped create the entrepreneurship gap, and government has an obligation to help solve it -- with bold policies that tackle the problem head on. Everyone deserves the opportunity to fight for the American dream -- to build something real and build a brighter future for themselves and their loved ones. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" Elizabeth doesn't accept contributions from PACs of any kind or federally registered lobbyists. This grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you. Peter,
Democrats have rightly been focused on defeating President Trump in 2020, and while we have an impressive slate of candidates running for the presidential nomination, this is not the only critical fight we need to win in 2020. Just as importantly, Democrats must take back the Senate.
Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has shamefully turned the Senate into a legislative graveyard, blocking progress on everything from protecting our elections to passing the American Dream and Promise Act. To end this era of obstruction, we must start fighting now to win a Democratic Senate.

With a Democratic Senate alongside a Democratic President, we can finally make progress on climate change, gun reform, health care, and immigration. We can undo the damage caused by the Trump Administration and ensure our government doesn't just work for those at the top.
But we're facing an uphill battle to win back the Senate, and we've got to start preparing now to elect new Democrats and defend every single Democratic seat, including right here in Illinois.

Dick Durbin

Special interests have been celebrating ever since. Buying and selling candidates became acceptable. Spending enormous amounts to influence government decisions is considered normal.

subject: Thanks for being part of the Gravelanche
body:
We're only just getting started | | |
---
| | Thanks a ton. I mean it. Without you all, we wouldn’t have been able to get 47,500 donors today. While DNC-approved pollsters refused to take us seriously early on and excluded us in more than half of their polls, and the mainstream media treated us as a mere novelty or completely ignored us, together we have consistently outpolled and outraised clowns like Hickenlooper and Delaney since our campaign took off. We still have a few weeks to reach 65,000 donors for the second debate in July. We still have time to show them that we are serious. If you’re reading this, you had a hand in helping us. Every donation, every retweet, every conversation at a party, helped. We have built a coalition of pro-peace, pro-democracy, pro-worker, pro-future supporters who will only grow stronger. Actually, we’re still building it. We have time to show the DNC that we--thousands of Americans and our allies worldwide--are a unified and formidable front. That their warmongering can’t go unchecked any longer. Between democratic reforms, justice for sex workers, and global peace, we’ve asked for you to join us in fighting for quite a few things. While we didn’t make the June DNC deadline, with your help, we are on track to qualify for the July debate. Keep it up. Your voices have combined into something amazing, and we have another shot to put them on the national stage. When we do, I have a feeling we’ll really make a splash. Thanks for all you’ve done so far, David, campaign manager [Donate just $1.00](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=e150d523be&e=85f7472d66)

name: Rick Palacio, Team Hickenlooper
subject: we need an LGBT ally in the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
| | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717de/691c9bd/6df93b8d/11a4c85d/2681660718/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--I'm Rick, John's friend and an advisor to this campaign. And this Pride Month, I wanted to shoot you a note to say _**[how much it would mean to me personally if you could support John on this journey toward the White House.](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pridebump-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

A little about me: a sixth-generation Coloradan, I was the first Latino to ever chair the Colorado Democratic Party, and one year ago,** I got married to my partner in crime and the love of my life--Graham.**

These multiple aspects of my identity have given me a front-row seat to multiple battles for civil rights, especially as they've played out in a purple state.

**One of my most important allies along the way has been John.** Not only has John been a supporter of the LGBTQ community his whole life (no learning curve there), he acted on that support while he was Governor. In 2013, he called a special session of our state legislature to legalize civil unions--and once marriage equality became federal law, Graham and I knew exactly whom we wanted to pronounce us husband and husband. [](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pridebump-all_all_i1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_Here 's John marrying us, using vows we wrote ourselves._ John has been my Mayor, my Governor, my Democratic ally, my friend, my marriage officiant, my drinking buddy--and now, I want to see him as my President. **We need a commander-in-chief who embraces all Americans and who will never compromise on achieving dignity, equality, and inclusion for all.**

With all the progress we've made, we can't afford to see it rolled back--least of all by the two Trump appointees now installed on the Supreme Court.

_**[In honor of Pride Month, can you stand with John today to help grow this campaign into a force that can defeat Donald Trump and protect the important progress we've made?](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pridebump-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ [](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190615_RP_20190615-fr-RP-pridebump-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
Rick

Rick Palacio
Senior Advisor
Hickenlooper 2020
---

---

We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717de/691c9bd/6df93b8d/11a4c853/2681660718/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

_Original Message from Joe Biden_
**[Peter -- I'm asking for a minute of your time, and maybe a small donation. There is no reason we can't own the 21st century. _We just have to get out of our own way and remember who we are._

Peter, together, we will restore this version of America. I promise you that. But first we need to get through this election.

body:
This is brief -- I promise.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190615pm_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, I know my team emailed you earlier about today's critical deadline, but I'm writing again because I just heard we're still $3,544 short -- and we only have 6 hours left to close the gap. **Friend, this is the last time I 'll ask before our mid-month deadline.
